Add Apache Struts 2 HelloWorld (struts2-core 6.8.0) (#11)

* Initial plan

* Add Apache Struts 2 HelloWorld application

- HelloAction.java: Struts 2 action with "Hello, World!" + random dice emoji
- struts.xml: action mapping for index action
- web.xml: StrutsPrepareAndExecuteFilter setup
- index.jsp: JSP template with Struts tag library
- css/style.css: centered card layout (matches spring/play projects)
- HelloActionTest.java: 3 JUnit 5 unit tests (all passing)
- pom.xml: Struts 6.4.0, log4j-core, JUnit 5, Jetty 11 Maven plugin
- README.md: Japanese docs for setup/run/test

Agent-Logs-Url: https://github.com/kotaoue/HelloJava/sessions/15fb9e66-ffa8-4c1f-b032-23a632505fa9

Co-authored-by: kotaoue <1369749+kotaoue@users.noreply.github.com>

* Upgrade struts2-core to 6.8.0 to fix DoS vulnerabilities; align log4j-core to 2.25.1

Agent-Logs-Url: https://github.com/kotaoue/HelloJava/sessions/15fb9e66-ffa8-4c1f-b032-23a632505fa9

Co-authored-by: kotaoue <1369749+kotaoue@users.noreply.github.com>

* Switch to javax servlet APIs and Jetty 10

Replace Jakarta EE 5 servlet/JSP artifacts with Javax equivalents and target Servlet/JSP 4.0: update pom.xml to use javax.servlet:javax.servlet-api 4.0.1 and javax.servlet.jsp:javax.servlet.jsp-api 2.3.3, and downgrade jetty-maven-plugin from 11.0.20 to 10.0.20. Update web.xml to use the Java EE namespace/schema (web-app 4.0) and tidy XML formatting. These changes restore compatibility with Servlet/JSP 4.0 containers (and Jetty 10).

---------

fix: generate GitHub App token for create-pull-request and auto-merge steps (#55)

The collect-metrics workflow was failing because secrets.METRICS_GITHUB_TOKEN
was not supplied to peter-evans/create-pull-request@v8. Fix by generating a
short-lived token from the existing GitHub App credentials (APP_ID +
APP_PRIVATE_KEY) and using that token in the Create PR and Enable auto-merge
steps.

commit.message:
Add Copilot CLI session capture (umx capture copilot)

New module umx/copilot_capture.py parses Copilot CLI events.jsonl logs
and imports user/assistant messages as umx sessions. Filters system-
injected content (<environment_context>, <current_datetime>, etc.)
and deduplicates messages.

CLI: umx capture copilot [--file PATH] [--source-root PATH] [--dry-run]
Defaults to latest session from ~/.copilot/session-state/.

Dogfood-verified: captured this session (84 events), ran dream pipeline,
extracted 127 facts, search works on captured content.

25 new tests, 236 total passing.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
feat: FLAC passthrough + pre-buffer for reduced playback latency

- Eliminate local ffmpeg transcoding: raw audio bytes (FLAC/MP3/AAC)
  pass directly from Yandex CDN to MA's ffmpeg
- Pre-buffer system: audio download starts on Ynison track change
  before the player HTTP GET, hiding API/CDN latency
- PluginSource audio_format changed from PCM_S16LE to FLAC
- Seek uses ffmpeg fallback only when needed
- Reduces playback start delay by ~3-5s (15-20s → 10-12s)
- 80 tests passing, 9 new tests for passthrough and pre-buffer

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
fix: Feed tab shows 'Link Connector' for already-connected agents + auto-fetch messages

Bug 1 (agents_sprint.py): GET /channel-messages returned has_connectors=False
for agents whose ConnectorAgent rows were missing (older agents or transient
creation failure). Add self-heal: on empty ConnectorAgent query, read
agent.config.connector_ids and idempotently create the missing rows. Handles
race conditions via IntegrityError catch (re-queries after rollback) and clears
connector_ids on general commit failure so the response stays accurate.

Bug 2 (AgentMessagesTab.tsx): Feed tab showed empty waiting state even when
Discord was connected because the local DB had no cached messages. Add a
one-shot backfill mutation (POST /channel-messages/backfill) that fires on
mount when has_connectors=True but messages=0. Shows 'Fetching latest messages
from Discord...' while in-flight. Uses a ref to prevent repeated calls.

Also imports IntegrityError from sqlalchemy.exc for precise exception handling.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

REASON: (1) ShowToken downward conversion penalties revised across all 5 tiers.
(2) MEMBERSHIP.TIERS 5-tier repo structure confirmed canonical over 4-tier pricing doc.
(3) DIAMOND_TIER.VOLUME_TIERS 3-tier repo structure confirmed canonical — pricing doc 5-tier table superseded.

No service logic altered. No schema changes. No migrations.

* FIZ: Add TOKEN_EXTENSION constant block to governance.config.ts

REASON: CEO decision 2026-04-11. Token Extension is a three-option paid
commercial product for expired tokens. Not a refund. Not a grace period.
Extension fee framing only.
IMPACT: New TOKEN_EXTENSION constant block added. No existing constants modified.
No service logic. No schema changes. No migrations.
CORRELATION_ID: FIZ-PRICING-DECISIONS-2026-04-11
GATE: CEO-AUTHORIZED-STAGED-2026-04-11

Co-authored-by: OmniQuestMediaInc <240893763+OmniQuestMediaInc@users.noreply.github.com>

* FIZ: Revise FIZ-002 — rename to TokenExtensionService, remove Three-Fifths Exit

REASON: CEO decision 2026-04-11. DisputeResolutionService was misnamed.
Token Bridge mechanic is repurposed as Option A of the Token Extension product.
Step 2 (Three-Fifths Exit cash refund) and flagAfterDeclinedOffers are eliminated.
No cash refund path exists on the platform.
IMPACT: finance/dispute-resolution.service.ts renamed to finance/token-extension.service.ts.
Class renamed TokenExtensionService. offerThreeFifthsExit method removed.
flagAfterDeclinedOffers method removed. DisputeStage enum simplified.
offerTokenBridge method retained and reframed as Option A extension pathway.
All internal references to THREE_FIFTHS_REFUND_PCT removed.
CORRELATION_ID: FIZ-002-REVISION-2026-04-11
GATE: CEO-AUTHORIZED-STAGED-2026-04-11

commit.message:
Phase 3: webkit-jsi JS runtime for YouTube anti-throttle

Bundle yt-dlp-apple-webkit-jsi plugin for YouTube signature deobfuscation.
The plugin uses ctypes → libobjc → WKWebView → JavaScriptCore on iOS
to evaluate YouTube's obfuscated JS, preventing download throttling.

CI:
- pip install yt-dlp-apple-webkit-jsi in both build jobs
- Verify webkit_jsi.py present in packages and IPA bundle
- Verify _ctypes.framework present in Frameworks/

Python:
- check_js_runtime() diagnostic: tests ctypes import, plugin install,
  and availability using plugin's own IS_AVAIL + DarwinMinVer logic

Swift:
- checkJsRuntime method channel handler (runWithResult for GIL safety)

Flutter:
- checkJsRuntime() in LibraryManager
- _JsRuntimeSection in settings: shows ctypes, plugin, platform status
- Shows 'anti-throttle active' when all checks pass on iOS

Note: _ctypes.so is already in BeeWare Python-Apple-support 3.13-b13
and gets auto-converted to .framework by post_build.sh. No build
pipeline changes needed for the C extension itself.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Fix --version in release builds: use OSCAN_VERSION env var

build.rs now checks OSCAN_VERSION env var first, falls back to git
describe. The release workflow sets OSCAN_VERSION from the prepare
job's tag output, ensuring the binary always reports the correct
release version (not the previous tag).

Also added cargo:rerun-if-env-changed=OSCAN_VERSION so Cargo
correctly rebuilds when the env var changes.

commit.message:
Ⓜ feat: add configurable agent marker for send and edit messages (#40)

Add agentMarker parameter to sendMessage and editMessage actions that
prepends a configurable prefix to message content. Supports per-call
parameter override and TEAMS_AGENT_MARKER env var fallback.

Key behaviors:
- Parameter takes precedence over env var
- Empty string explicitly disables the marker
- Marker is not prepended to empty content
- For editMessage, marker is applied before reply guard annotation

Closes #25
Closes #29
